verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Moses lead God's Children Forty years He led them Thru the cold ang through the night Though they said let's turn back Moses said keep going Canaans Land is just in sight

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There will be no sorrow There in that tomorrow We will be there by and by Milk ang honey flowing That is where I'm going Canaans Land is just in sight

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Though we walk through the valleys Though we climb high mountains We cannot give up the fight We must be like Moses We must keep on going Canaans land is just in sight
